heading: Omitted
label: 1202 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which related to determination of per capita shares, reversion of denied shares to the tribe, and use of reverted funds, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 91–283, § 284 Stat. 313June 19, 1970
